cause_analysis.narrative: Healthyy Healing Handz Mobile Nails churned on 2026-04-23 after 371 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 125 times, but the client only replied 33. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
